ConnectionStrings._Comment_ShopfloorDb: PostgreSQL connection for the shopfloor schema. Set via env var ConnectionStrings__ShopfloorDb or `dotnet user-secrets set ConnectionStrings:ShopfloorDb 'Host=localhost;Port=5432;Database=lkvitai_shopfloor_dev;Username=postgres;Password=...'`. Never commit a real value here.
ConnectionStrings._Comment_LKvitaiDb: Legacy SQL Server. Set via env var ConnectionStrings__LKvitaiDb or user-secrets. Never commit a real value here.

LegacyProductTypes._Comment_DataSource: Sql (requires ConnectionStrings:LKvitaiDb) or Stub for local fixtures.
